chapters.zh: 提阿非罗大人哪，有好些人提笔作书，述说在我们中间所成就的事，是照传道的人从起初亲眼看见又传给我们的。
chapters.en: Forasmuch as many have taken in hand to set forth in order a declaration of those things which are most surely believed among us,

chapters.zh: a
chapters.en: Even as they delivered them unto us, which from the beginning were eyewitnesses, and ministers of the word;

chapters.zh: 这些事我既从起头都详细考察了，就定意要按著次序写给你，
chapters.en: It seemed good to me also, having had perfect understanding of all things from the very first, to write unto thee in order, most excellent Theophilus,

chapters.zh: 使你知道所学之道都是确实的。
chapters.en: That thou mightest know the certainty of those things, wherein thou hast been instructed.

chapters.zh: 当犹太王希律的时候，亚比雅班里有一个祭司，名叫撒迦利亚；他妻子是亚伦的后人，名叫以利沙伯。
chapters.en: There was in the days of Herod, the king of Judaea, a certain priest named Zacharias, of the course of Abia: and his wife of the daughters of Aaron, and her name Elisabeth.

chapters.zh: 他们二人在神面前都是义人，遵行主的一切诫命礼仪，没有可指摘的，
chapters.en: And they were both righteous before God, walking in all the commandments and ordinances of the Lord blameless.

chapters.zh: 只是没有孩子；因为以利沙伯不生育，两个人又年纪老迈了。
chapters.en: And they had no child, because that Elisabeth was barren, and they both were well stricken in years.

chapters.zh: 撒迦利亚按班次在神面前供祭司的职分，
chapters.en: And it came to pass, that while he executed the priest's office before God in the order of his course,

chapters.zh: 照祭司的规矩掣签，得进主殿烧香。
chapters.en: According to the custom of the priest's office, his lot was to burn incense when he went into the temple of the Lord.

chapters.zh: 烧香的时候，众百姓在外面祷告。
chapters.en: And the whole multitude of the people were praying without at the time of incense.

chapters.zh: 有主的使者站在香坛的右边，向他显现。
chapters.en: And there appeared unto him an angel of the Lord standing on the right side of the altar of incense.

chapters.zh: 撒迦利亚看见，就惊慌害怕。
chapters.en: And when Zacharias saw , he was troubled, and fear fell upon him.

chapters.zh: 天使对他说：撒迦利亚，不要害怕，因为你的祈祷已经被听见了。你的妻子以利沙伯要给你生一个儿子，你要给他起名叫约翰。
chapters.en: But the angel said unto him, Fear not, Zacharias: for thy prayer is heard; and thy wife Elisabeth shall bear thee a son, and thou shalt call his name John.

chapters.zh: 你必欢喜快乐；有许多人因他出世，也必喜乐。
chapters.en: And thou shalt have joy and gladness; and many shall rejoice at his birth.

chapters.zh: 他在主面前将要为大，淡酒浓酒都不喝，从母腹里就被圣灵充满了。
chapters.en: For he shall be great in the sight of the Lord, and shall drink neither wine nor strong drink; and he shall be filled with the Holy Ghost, even from his mother's womb.

chapters.zh: 他要使许多以色列人回转，归于主 ─ 他们的神。
chapters.en: And many of the children of Israel shall he turn to the Lord their God.

chapters.zh: 他必有以利亚的心志能力，行在主的前面，叫为父的心转向儿女，叫悖逆的人转从义人的智慧，又为主预备合用的百姓。
chapters.en: And he shall go before him in the spirit and power of Elias, to turn the hearts of the fathers to the children, and the disobedient to the wisdom of the just; to make ready a people prepared for the Lord.

chapters.zh: 撒迦利亚对天使说：我凭著甚么可知道这事呢？我已经老了，我的妻子也年纪老迈了。
chapters.en: And Zacharias said unto the angel, Whereby shall I know this? for I am an old man, and my wife well stricken in years.

chapters.zh: 天使回答说：我是站在神面前的加百列，奉差而来对你说话，将这好信息报给你。
chapters.en: And the angel answering said unto him, I am Gabriel, that stand in the presence of God; and am sent to speak unto thee, and to shew thee these glad tidings.

chapters.zh: 到了时候，这话必然应验；只因你不信，你必哑吧，不能说话，直到这事成就的日子。
chapters.en: And, behold, thou shalt be dumb, and not able to speak, until the day that these things shall be performed, because thou believest not my words, which shall be fulfilled in their season.

chapters.zh: 百姓等候撒迦利亚，诧异他许久在殿里。
chapters.en: And the people waited for Zacharias, and marvelled that he tarried so long in the temple.

chapters.zh: 及至他出来，不能和他们说话，他们就知道他在殿里见了异象；因为他直向他们打手式，竟成了哑吧。
chapters.en: And when he came out, he could not speak unto them: and they perceived that he had seen a vision in the temple: for he beckoned unto them, and remained speechless.

chapters.zh: 他供职的日子已满，就回家去了。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, that, as soon as the days of his ministration were accomplished, he departed to his own house.

chapters.zh: 这些日子以后，他的妻子以利沙伯怀了孕，就隐藏了五个月，
chapters.en: And after those days his wife Elisabeth conceived, and hid herself five months, saying,

chapters.zh: 说：主在眷顾我的日子，这样看待我，要把我在人间的羞耻除掉。
chapters.en: Thus hath the Lord dealt with me in the days wherein he looked on , to take away my reproach among men.

chapters.zh: 到了第六个月，天使加百列奉神的差遣往加利利的一座城去，这城名叫拿撒勒，
chapters.en: And in the sixth month the angel Gabriel was sent from God unto a city of Galilee, named Nazareth,

chapters.zh: 到一个童女那里，是已经许配大卫家的一个人，名叫约瑟。童女的名字叫马利亚；
chapters.en: To a virgin espoused to a man whose name was Joseph, of the house of David; and the virgin's name Mary.

chapters.zh: 天使进去，对他说：蒙大恩的女子，我问你安，主和你同在了！
chapters.en: And the angel came in unto her, and said, Hail, highly favoured, the Lord with thee: blessed thou among women.

chapters.zh: 马利亚因这话就很惊慌，又反复思想这样问安是甚么意思。
chapters.en: And when she saw , she was troubled at his saying, and cast in her mind what manner of salutation this should be.

chapters.zh: 天使对他说：马利亚，不要怕！你在神面前已经蒙恩了。
chapters.en: And the angel said unto her, Fear not, Mary: for thou hast found favour with God.

chapters.zh: 你要怀孕生子，可以给他起名叫耶稣。
chapters.en: And, behold, thou shalt conceive in thy womb, and bring forth a son, and shalt call his name JESUS.

chapters.zh: 他要为大，称为至高者的儿子；主神要把他祖大卫的位给他。
chapters.en: He shall be great, and shall be called the Son of the Highest: and the Lord God shall give unto him the throne of his father David:

chapters.zh: 他要作雅各家的王，直到永远；他的国也没有穷尽。
chapters.en: And he shall reign over the house of Jacob for ever; and of his kingdom there shall be no end.

chapters.zh: 马利亚对天使说：我没有出嫁，怎么有这事呢？
chapters.en: Then said Mary unto the angel, How shall this be, seeing I know not a man?

chapters.zh: 天使回答说：圣灵要临到你身上，至高者的能力要荫庇你，因此所要生的圣者必称为神的儿子（或作：所要生的，必称为圣，称为神的儿子）。
chapters.en: And the angel answered and said unto her, The Holy Ghost shall come upon thee, and the power of the Highest shall overshadow thee: therefore also that holy thing which shall be born of thee shall be called the Son of God.

chapters.zh: 况且你的亲戚以利沙伯，在年老的时候也怀了男胎，就是那素来称为不生育的，现在有孕六个月了。
chapters.en: And, behold, thy cousin Elisabeth, she hath also conceived a son in her old age: and this is the sixth month with her, who was called barren.

chapters.zh: 因为，出于神的话，没有一句不带能力的。
chapters.en: For with God nothing shall be impossible.

chapters.zh: 马利亚说：我是主的使女，情愿照你的话成就在我身上。天使就离开他去了。
chapters.en: And Mary said, Behold the handmaid of the Lord; be it unto me according to thy word. And the angel departed from her.

chapters.zh: 那时候，马利亚起身，急忙往山地里去，来到犹大的一座城；
chapters.en: And Mary arose in those days, and went into the hill country with haste, into a city of Juda;

chapters.zh: 进了撒迦利亚的家，问以利沙伯安。
chapters.en: And entered into the house of Zacharias, and saluted Elisabeth.

chapters.zh: 以利沙伯一听马利亚问安，所怀的胎就在腹里跳动。以利沙伯且被圣灵充满，
chapters.en: And it came to pass, that, when Elisabeth heard the salutation of Mary, the babe leaped in her womb; and Elisabeth was filled with the Holy Ghost:

chapters.zh: 高声喊著说：你在妇女中是有福的！你所怀的胎也是有福的！
chapters.en: And she spake out with a loud voice, and said, Blessed thou among women, and blessed the fruit of thy womb.

chapters.zh: 我主的母到我这里来，这是从那里得的呢？
chapters.en: And whence this to me, that the mother of my Lord should come to me?

chapters.zh: 因为你问安的声音一入我耳，我腹里的胎就欢喜跳动。
chapters.en: For, lo, as soon as the voice of thy salutation sounded in mine ears, the babe leaped in my womb for joy.

chapters.zh: 这相信的女子是有福的！因为主对他所说的话都要应验。
chapters.en: And blessed she that believed: for there shall be a performance of those things which were told her from the Lord.

chapters.zh: 马利亚说：我心尊主为大；
chapters.en: And Mary said, My soul doth magnify the Lord,

chapters.zh: 我灵以神我的救主为乐；
chapters.en: And my spirit hath rejoiced in God my Saviour.

chapters.zh: 因为他顾念他使女的卑微；从今以后，万代要称我有福。
chapters.en: For he hath regarded the low estate of his handmaiden: for, behold, from henceforth all generations shall call me blessed.

chapters.zh: 那有权能的，为我成就了大事；他的名为圣。
chapters.en: For he that is mighty hath done to me great things; and holy his name.

chapters.zh: 他怜悯敬畏他的人，直到世世代代。
chapters.en: And his mercy on them that fear him from generation to generation.

chapters.zh: 他用膀臂施展大能；那狂傲的人正心里妄想就被他赶散了。
chapters.en: He hath shewed strength with his arm; he hath scattered the proud in the imagination of their hearts.

chapters.zh: 他叫有权柄的失位，叫卑贱的升高；
chapters.en: He hath put down the mighty from seats, and exalted them of low degree.

chapters.zh: 叫饥饿的得饱美食，叫富足的空手回去。
chapters.en: He hath filled the hungry with good things; and the rich he hath sent empty away.

chapters.zh: 他扶助了他的仆人以色列，
chapters.en: He hath holpen his servant Israel, in remembrance of mercy;

chapters.zh: 为要记念亚伯拉罕和他的后裔，施怜悯直到永远，正如从前对我们列祖所说的话。
chapters.en: As he spake to our fathers, to Abraham, and to his seed for ever.

chapters.zh: 马利亚和以利沙伯同住，约有三个月，就回家去了。
chapters.en: And Mary abode with her about three months, and returned to her own house.

chapters.zh: 以利沙伯的产期到了，就生了一个儿子。
chapters.en: Now Elisabeth's full time came that she should be delivered; and she brought forth a son.

chapters.zh: 邻里亲族听见主向他大施怜悯，就和他一同欢乐。
chapters.en: And her neighbours and her cousins heard how the Lord had shewed great mercy upon her; and they rejoiced with her.

chapters.zh: 到了第八日，他们来要给孩子行割礼，并要照他父亲的名字叫他撒迦利亚。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, that on the eighth day they came to circumcise the child; and they called him Zacharias, after the name of his father.

chapters.zh: 他母亲说：不可！要叫他约翰。
chapters.en: And his mother answered and said, Not ; but he shall be called John.

chapters.zh: 他们说：你亲族中没有叫这名字的。
chapters.en: And they said unto her, There is none of thy kindred that is called by this name.

chapters.zh: 他们就向他父亲打手式，问他要叫这孩子甚么名字。
chapters.en: And they made signs to his father, how he would have him called.

chapters.zh: 他要了一块写字的板，就写上，说：他的名字是约翰。他们便都希奇。
chapters.en: And he asked for a writing table, and wrote, saying, His name is John. And they marvelled all.

chapters.zh: 撒迦利亚的口立时开了，舌头也舒展了，就说出话来，称颂神。
chapters.en: And his mouth was opened immediately, and his tongue , and he spake, and praised God.

chapters.zh: 周围居住的人都惧怕；这一切的事就传遍了犹太的山地。
chapters.en: And fear came on all that dwelt round about them: and all these sayings were noised abroad throughout all the hill country of Judaea.

chapters.zh: 凡听见的人都将这事放在心里，说：这个孩子将来怎么样呢？因为有主与他同在。
chapters.en: And all they that heard laid up in their hearts, saying, What manner of child shall this be! And the hand of the Lord was with him.

chapters.zh: 他父亲撒迦利亚被圣灵充满了，就预言说：
chapters.en: And his father Zacharias was filled with the Holy Ghost, and prophesied, saying,

chapters.zh: 主 ─ 以色列的神是应当称颂的！因他眷顾他的百姓，为他们施行救赎，
chapters.en: Blessed the Lord God of Israel; for he hath visited and redeemed his people,

chapters.zh: 在他仆人大卫家中，为我们兴起了拯救的角，
chapters.en: And hath raised up an horn of salvation for us in the house of his servant David;

chapters.zh: 正如主藉著从创世以来圣先知的口所说的话，
chapters.en: As he spake by the mouth of his holy prophets, which have been since the world began:

chapters.zh: 拯救我们脱离仇敌和一切恨我们之人的手，
chapters.en: That we should be saved from our enemies, and from the hand of all that hate us;

chapters.zh: 向我们列祖施怜悯，记念他的圣约 ─
chapters.en: To perform the mercy to our fathers, and to remember his holy covenant;

chapters.zh: 就是他对我们祖宗亚伯拉罕所起的誓 ─
chapters.en: The oath which he sware to our father Abraham,

chapters.zh: 叫我们既从仇敌手中被救出来，
chapters.en: That he would grant unto us, that we being delivered out of the hand of our enemies might serve him without fear,

chapters.zh: 就可以终身在他面前，坦然无惧的用圣洁、公义事奉他。
chapters.en: In holiness and righteousness before him, all the days of our life.

chapters.zh: 孩子阿！你要称为至高者的先知；因为你要行在主的前面，预备他的道路，
chapters.en: And thou, child, shalt be called the prophet of the Highest: for thou shalt go before the face of the Lord to prepare his ways;

chapters.zh: 叫他的百姓因罪得赦，就知道救恩。
chapters.en: To give knowledge of salvation unto his people by the remission of their sins,

chapters.zh: 因我们神怜悯的心肠，叫清晨的日光从高天临到我们，
chapters.en: Through the tender mercy of our God; whereby the dayspring from on high hath visited us,

chapters.zh: 要照亮坐在黑暗中死荫里的人，把我们的脚引到平安的路上。
chapters.en: To give light to them that sit in darkness and the shadow of death, to guide our feet into the way of peace.

chapters.zh: 那孩子渐渐长大，心灵强健，住在旷野，直到他显明在以色列人面前的日子。
chapters.en: And the child grew, and waxed strong in spirit, and was in the deserts till the day of his shewing unto Israel.

chapters.zh: 当那些日子，该撒亚古士督有旨意下来，叫天下人民都报名上册。
chapters.en: And it came to pass in those days, that there went out a decree from Caesar Augustus, that all the world should be taxed.

chapters.zh: 这是居里扭作叙利亚巡抚的时候，头一次行报名上册的事。
chapters.en: ( this taxing was first made when Cyrenius was governor of Syria.)

chapters.zh: 众人各归各城，报名上册。
chapters.en: And all went to be taxed, every one into his own city.

chapters.zh: 约瑟也从加利利的拿撒勒城上犹太去，到了大卫的城，名叫伯利恒，因他本是大卫一族一家的人，
chapters.en: And Joseph also went up from Galilee, out of the city of Nazareth, into Judaea, unto the city of David, which is called Bethlehem; (because he was of the house and lineage of David:)

chapters.zh: 要和他所聘之妻马利亚一同报名上册。那时马利亚的身孕已经重了。
chapters.en: To be taxed with Mary his espoused wife, being great with child.

chapters.zh: 他们在那里的时候，马利亚的产期到了，
chapters.en: And so it was, that, while they were there, the days were accomplished that she should be delivered.

chapters.zh: 就生了头胎的儿子，用布包起来，放在马槽里，因为客店里没有地方。
chapters.en: And she brought forth her firstborn son, and wrapped him in swaddling clothes, and laid him in a manger; because there was no room for them in the inn.

chapters.zh: 在伯利恒之野地里有牧羊的人，夜间按著更次看守羊群。
chapters.en: And there were in the same country shepherds abiding in the field, keeping watch over their flock by night.

chapters.zh: 有主的使者站在他们旁边，主的荣光四面照著他们；牧羊的人就甚惧怕。
chapters.en: And, lo, the angel of the Lord came upon them, and the glory of the Lord shone round about them: and they were sore afraid.

chapters.zh: 那天使对他们说：不要惧怕！我报给你们大喜的信息，是关乎万民的；
chapters.en: And the angel said unto them, Fear not: for, behold, I bring you good tidings of great joy, which shall be to all people.

chapters.zh: 因今天在大卫的城里，为你们生了救主，就是主基督。
chapters.en: For unto you is born this day in the city of David a Saviour, which is Christ the Lord.

chapters.zh: 你们要看见一个婴孩，包著布，卧在马槽里，那就是记号了。
chapters.en: And this a sign unto you; Ye shall find the babe wrapped in swaddling clothes, lying in a manger.

chapters.zh: 忽然，有一大队天兵同那天使赞美神说：
chapters.en: And suddenly there was with the angel a multitude of the heavenly host praising God, and saying,

chapters.zh: 在至高之处荣耀归与神！在地上平安归与他所喜悦的人（有古卷作：喜悦归与人）！
chapters.en: Glory to God in the highest, and on earth peace, good will toward men.

chapters.zh: 众天使离开他们，升天去了。牧羊的人彼此说：我们往伯利恒去，看看所成的事，就是主所指示我们的。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, as the angels were gone away from them into heaven, the shepherds said one to another, Let us now go even unto Bethlehem, and see this thing which is come to pass, which the Lord hath made known unto us.

chapters.zh: 他们急忙去了，就寻见马利亚和约瑟，又有那婴孩卧在马槽里；
chapters.en: And they came with haste, and found Mary, and Joseph, and the babe lying in a manger.

chapters.zh: 既然看见，就把天使论这孩子的话传开了。
chapters.en: And when they had seen , they made known abroad the saying which was told them concerning this child.

chapters.zh: 凡听见的，就诧异牧羊之人对他们所说的话。
chapters.en: And all they that heard wondered at those things which were told them by the shepherds.

chapters.zh: 马利亚却把这一切的事存在心里，反复思想。
chapters.en: But Mary kept all these things, and pondered in her heart.

chapters.zh: 牧羊的人回去了，因所听见所看见的一切事，正如天使向他们所说的，就归荣耀与神，赞美他。
chapters.en: And the shepherds returned, glorifying and praising God for all the things that they had heard and seen, as it was told unto them.

chapters.zh: 满了八天，就给孩子行割礼，与他起名叫耶稣；这就是没有成胎以前，天使所起的名。
chapters.en: And when eight days were accomplished for the circumcising of the child, his name was called JESUS, which was so named of the angel before he was conceived in the womb.

chapters.zh: 按摩西律法满了洁净的日子，他们带著孩子上耶路撒冷去，要把他献与主。
chapters.en: And when the days of her purification according to the law of Moses were accomplished, they brought him to Jerusalem, to present to the Lord;

chapters.zh: （正如主的律法上所记：凡头生的男子必称圣归主；）
chapters.en: (As it is written in the law of the Lord, Every male that openeth the womb shall be called holy to the Lord;)

chapters.zh: 又要照主的律法上所说，或用一对班鸠，或用两只雏鸽献祭。
chapters.en: And to offer a sacrifice according to that which is said in the law of the Lord, A pair of turtledoves, or two young pigeons.

chapters.zh: 在耶路撒冷有一个人，名叫西面；这人又公义又虔诚，素常盼望以色列的安慰者来到，又有圣灵在他身上。
chapters.en: And, behold, there was a man in Jerusalem, whose name Simeon; and the same man just and devout, waiting for the consolation of Israel: and the Holy Ghost was upon him.

chapters.zh: 他得了圣灵的启示，知道自己未死以前，必看见主所立的基督。
chapters.en: And it was revealed unto him by the Holy Ghost, that he should not see death, before he had seen the Lord's Christ.

chapters.zh: 他受了圣灵的感动，进入圣殿，正遇见耶稣的父母抱著孩子进来，要照律法的规矩办理。
chapters.en: And he came by the Spirit into the temple: and when the parents brought in the child Jesus, to do for him after the custom of the law,

chapters.zh: 西面就用手接过他来，称颂神说：
chapters.en: Then took he him up in his arms, and blessed God, and said,

chapters.zh: 主阿！如今可以照你的话，释放仆人安然去世；
chapters.en: Lord, now lettest thou thy servant depart in peace, according to thy word:

chapters.zh: 因为我的眼睛已经看见你的救恩 ─
chapters.en: For mine eyes have seen thy salvation,

chapters.zh: 就是你在万民面前所预备的：
chapters.en: Which thou hast prepared before the face of all people;

chapters.zh: 是照亮外邦人的光，又是你民以色列的荣耀。
chapters.en: A light to lighten the Gentiles, and the glory of thy people Israel.

chapters.zh: 孩子的父母因这论耶稣的话就希奇。
chapters.en: And Joseph and his mother marvelled at those things which were spoken of him.

chapters.zh: 西面给他们祝福，又对孩子的母亲马利亚说：这孩子被立，是要叫以色列中许多人跌倒，许多人兴起；又要作毁谤的话柄，叫许多人心里的意念显露出来；你自己的心也要被刀刺透。
chapters.en: And Simeon blessed them, and said unto Mary his mother, Behold, this is set for the fall and rising again of many in Israel; and for a sign which shall be spoken against;

chapters.zh: a
chapters.en: (Yea, a sword shall pierce through thy own soul also,) that the thoughts of many hearts may be revealed.

chapters.zh: 又有女先知，名叫亚拿，是亚设支派法内力的女儿，年纪已经老迈，从作童女出嫁的时候，同丈夫住了七年就寡居了，
chapters.en: And there was one Anna, a prophetess, the daughter of Phanuel, of the tribe of Aser: she was of a great age, and had lived with an husband seven years from her virginity;

chapters.zh: 现在已经八十四岁（或作：就寡居了八十四年），并不离开圣殿，禁食祈求，昼夜事奉神。
chapters.en: And she a widow of about fourscore and four years, which departed not from the temple, but served with fastings and prayers night and day.

chapters.zh: 正当那时，他进前来称谢神，将孩子的事对一切盼望耶路撒冷得救赎的人讲说。
chapters.en: And she coming in that instant gave thanks likewise unto the Lord, and spake of him to all them that looked for redemption in Jerusalem.

chapters.zh: 约瑟和马利亚照主的律法办完了一切的事，就回加利利，到自己的城拿撒勒去了。
chapters.en: And when they had performed all things according to the law of the Lord, they returned into Galilee, to their own city Nazareth.

chapters.zh: 孩子渐渐长大，强健起来，充满智慧，又有神的恩在他身上。
chapters.en: And the child grew, and waxed strong in spirit, filled with wisdom: and the grace of God was upon him.

chapters.zh: 每年到逾越节，他父母就上耶路撒冷去。
chapters.en: Now his parents went to Jerusalem every year at the feast of the passover.

chapters.zh: 当他十二岁的时候，他们按著节期的规矩上去。
chapters.en: And when he was twelve years old, they went up to Jerusalem after the custom of the feast.

chapters.zh: 守满了节期，他们回去，孩童耶稣仍旧在耶路撒冷。他的父母并不知道，
chapters.en: And when they had fulfilled the days, as they returned, the child Jesus tarried behind in Jerusalem; and Joseph and his mother knew not .

chapters.zh: 以为他在同行的人中间，走了一天的路程，就在亲族和熟识的人中找他，
chapters.en: But they, supposing him to have been in the company, went a day's journey; and they sought him among kinsfolk and acquaintance.

chapters.zh: 既找不著，就回耶路撒冷去找他。
chapters.en: And when they found him not, they turned back again to Jerusalem, seeking him.

chapters.zh: 过了三天，就遇见他在殿里，坐在教师中间，一面听，一面问。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, that after three days they found him in the temple, sitting in the midst of the doctors, both hearing them, and asking them questions.

chapters.zh: 凡听见他的，都希奇他的聪明和他的应对。
chapters.en: And all that heard him were astonished at his understanding and answers.

chapters.zh: 他父母看见就很希奇。他母亲对他说：我儿！为甚么向我们这样行呢？看哪！你父亲和我伤心来找你！
chapters.en: And when they saw him, they were amazed: and his mother said unto him, Son, why hast thou thus dealt with us? behold, thy father and I have sought thee sorrowing.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：为甚么找我呢？岂不知我应当以我父的事为念么（或作：岂不知我应当在我父的家里么）？
chapters.en: And he said unto them, How is it that ye sought me? wist ye not that I must be about my Father's business?

chapters.zh: 他所说的这话，他们不明白。
chapters.en: And they understood not the saying which he spake unto them.

chapters.zh: 他就同他们下去，回到拿撒勒，并且顺从他们。他母亲把这一切的事都存在心里。
chapters.en: And he went down with them, and came to Nazareth, and was subject unto them: but his mother kept all these sayings in her heart.

chapters.zh: 耶稣的智慧和身量（或作：年纪），并神和人喜爱他的心，都一齐增长。
chapters.en: And Jesus increased in wisdom and stature, and in favour with God and man.

chapters.zh: 该撒提庇留在位第十五年，本丢彼拉多作犹太巡抚，希律作加利利分封的王，他兄弟腓力作以士利亚和特拉可尼地方分封的王，吕撒聂作亚比利尼分封的王，
chapters.en: Now in the fifteenth year of the reign of Tiberius Caesar, Pontius Pilate being governor of Judaea, and Herod being tetrarch of Galilee, and his brother Philip tetrarch of Ituraea and of the region of Trachonitis, and Lysanias the tetrarch of Abilene,

chapters.zh: 亚那和该亚法作大祭司。那时，撒迦利亚的儿子约翰在旷野里，神的话临到他。
chapters.en: Annas and Caiaphas being the high priests, the word of God came unto John the son of Zacharias in the wilderness.

chapters.zh: 他就来到约但河一带地方，宣讲悔改的洗礼，使罪得赦。
chapters.en: And he came into all the country about Jordan, preaching the baptism of repentance for the remission of sins;

chapters.zh: 正如先知以赛亚书上所记的话，说：在旷野有人声喊著说：预备主的道，修直他的路！
chapters.en: As it is written in the book of the words of Esaias the prophet, saying, The voice of one crying in the wilderness, Prepare ye the way of the Lord, make his paths straight.

chapters.zh: 一切山洼都要填满；大小山冈都要削平！弯弯曲曲的地方要改为正直；高高低低的道路要改为平坦！
chapters.en: Every valley shall be filled, and every mountain and hill shall be brought low; and the crooked shall be made straight, and the rough ways made smooth;

chapters.zh: 凡有血气的，都要见神的救恩！
chapters.en: And all flesh shall see the salvation of God.

chapters.zh: 约翰对那出来要受他洗的众人说：毒蛇的种类！谁指示你们逃避将来的忿怒呢？
chapters.en: Then said he to the multitude that came forth to be baptized of him, O generation of vipers, who hath warned you to flee from the wrath to come?

chapters.zh: 你们要结出果子来，与悔改的心相称。不要自己心里说：有亚伯拉罕为我们的祖宗。我告诉你们，神能从这些石头中，给亚伯拉罕兴起子孙来。
chapters.en: Bring forth therefore fruits worthy of repentance, and begin not to say within yourselves, We have Abraham to father: for I say unto you, That God is able of these stones to raise up children unto Abraham.

chapters.zh: 现在斧子已经放在树根上，凡不结好果子的树就砍下来，丢在火里。
chapters.en: And now also the axe is laid unto the root of the trees: every tree therefore which bringeth not forth good fruit is hewn down, and cast into the fire.

chapters.zh: 众人问他说：这样，我们当作甚么呢？
chapters.en: And the people asked him, saying, What shall we do then?

chapters.zh: 约翰回答说：有两件衣裳的，就分给那没有的；有食物的，也当这样行。
chapters.en: He answereth and saith unto them, He that hath two coats, let him impart to him that hath none; and he that hath meat, let him do likewise.

chapters.zh: 又有税吏来要受洗，问他说：夫子，我们当作甚么呢？
chapters.en: Then came also publicans to be baptized, and said unto him, Master, what shall we do?

chapters.zh: 约翰说：除了例定的数目，不要多取。
chapters.en: And he said unto them, Exact no more than that which is appointed you.

chapters.zh: 又有兵丁问他说：我们当作甚么呢？约翰说：不要以强暴待人，也不要讹诈人，自己有钱粮就当知足。
chapters.en: And the soldiers likewise demanded of him, saying, And what shall we do? And he said unto them, Do violence to no man, neither accuse falsely; and be content with your wages.

chapters.zh: 百姓指望基督来的时候，人都心里猜疑，或者约翰是基督。
chapters.en: And as the people were in expectation, and all men mused in their hearts of John, whether he were the Christ, or not;

chapters.zh: 约翰说：我是用水给你们施洗，但有一位能力比我更大的要来，我就是给他解鞋带也不配。他要用圣灵与火给你们施洗。
chapters.en: John answered, saying unto all, I indeed baptize you with water; but one mightier than I cometh, the latchet of whose shoes I am not worthy to unloose: he shall baptize you with the Holy Ghost and with fire:

chapters.zh: 他手里拿著簸箕，要扬净他的场，把麦子收在仓里，把糠用不灭的火烧尽了。
chapters.en: Whose fan in his hand, and he will throughly purge his floor, and will gather the wheat into his garner; but the chaff he will burn with fire unquenchable.

chapters.zh: 约翰又用许多别的话劝百姓，向他们传福音。
chapters.en: And many other things in his exhortation preached he unto the people.

chapters.zh: 只是分封的王希律，因他兄弟之妻希罗底的缘故，并因他所行的一切恶事，受了约翰的责备；
chapters.en: But Herod the tetrarch, being reproved by him for Herodias his brother Philip's wife, and for all the evils which Herod had done,

chapters.zh: 又另外添了一件，就是把约翰收在监里。
chapters.en: Added yet this above all, that he shut up John in prison.

chapters.zh: 众百姓都受了洗，耶稣也受了洗。正祷告的时候，天就开了，
chapters.en: Now when all the people were baptized, it came to pass, that Jesus also being baptized, and praying, the heaven was opened,

chapters.zh: 圣灵降临在他身上，形状彷佛鸽子；又有声音从天上来，说：你是我的爱子，我喜悦你。
chapters.en: And the Holy Ghost descended in a bodily shape like a dove upon him, and a voice came from heaven, which said, Thou art my beloved Son; in thee I am well pleased.

chapters.zh: 耶稣开头传道，年纪约有三十岁。依人看来，他是约瑟的儿子；约瑟是希里的儿子；
chapters.en: And Jesus himself began to be about thirty years of age, being (as was supposed) the son of Joseph, which was of Heli,

chapters.zh: 希里是玛塔的儿子；玛塔是利未的儿子；利未是麦基的儿子；麦基是雅拿的儿子；雅拿是约瑟的儿子；
chapters.en: Which was of Matthat, which was of Levi, which was of Melchi, which was of Janna, which was of Joseph,

chapters.zh: 约瑟是玛他提亚的儿子；玛他提亚是亚摩斯的儿子；亚摩斯是拿鸿的儿子；拿鸿是以斯利的儿子；以斯利是拿该的儿子；
chapters.en: Which was of Mattathias, which was of Amos, which was of Naum, which was of Esli, which was of Nagge,

chapters.zh: 拿该是玛押的儿子；玛押是玛他提亚的儿子；玛他提亚是西美的儿子；西美是约瑟的儿子；约瑟是犹大的儿子；犹大是约亚拿的儿子；
chapters.en: Which was of Maath, which was of Mattathias, which was of Semei, which was of Joseph, which was of Juda,

chapters.zh: 约亚拿是利撒的儿子；利撒是所罗巴伯的儿子；所罗巴伯是撒拉铁的儿子；撒拉铁是尼利的儿子；尼利是麦基的儿子；
chapters.en: Which was of Joanna, which was of Rhesa, which was of Zorobabel, which was of Salathiel, which was of Neri,

chapters.zh: 麦基是亚底的儿子；亚底是哥桑的儿子；哥桑是以摩当的儿子；以摩当是珥的儿子；珥是约细的儿子；
chapters.en: Which was of Melchi, which was of Addi, which was of Cosam, which was of Elmodam, which was of Er,

chapters.zh: 约细是以利以谢的儿子；以利以谢是约令的儿子；约令是玛塔的儿子；玛塔是利未的儿子；
chapters.en: Which was of Jose, which was of Eliezer, which was of Jorim, which was of Matthat, which was of Levi,

chapters.zh: 利未是西缅的儿子；西缅是犹大的儿子；犹大是约瑟的儿子；约瑟是约南的儿子；约南是以利亚敬的儿子；
chapters.en: Which was of Simeon, which was of Juda, which was of Joseph, which was of Jonan, which was of Eliakim,

chapters.zh: 以利亚敬是米利亚的儿子；米利亚是买南的儿子；买南是玛达他的儿子；玛达他是拿单的儿子；拿单是大卫的儿子；
chapters.en: Which was of Melea, which was of Menan, which was of Mattatha, which was of Nathan, which was of David,

chapters.zh: 大卫是耶西的儿子；耶西是俄备得的儿子；俄备得是波阿斯的儿子；波阿斯是撒门的儿子；撒门是拿顺的儿子；
chapters.en: Which was of Jesse, which was of Obed, which was of Booz, which was of Salmon, which was of Naasson,

chapters.zh: 拿顺是亚米拿达的儿子；亚米拿达是亚兰的儿子；亚兰是希斯仑的儿子；希斯仑是法勒斯的儿子；法勒斯是犹大的儿子；
chapters.en: Which was of Aminadab, which was of Aram, which was of Esrom, which was of Phares, which was of Juda,

chapters.zh: 犹大是雅各的儿子；雅各是以撒的儿子；以撒是亚伯拉罕的儿子；亚伯拉罕是他拉的儿子；他拉是拿鹤的儿子；
chapters.en: Which was of Jacob, which was of Isaac, which was of Abraham, which was of Thara, which was of Nachor,

chapters.zh: 拿鹤是西鹿的儿子；西鹿是拉吴的儿子；拉吴是法勒的儿子；法勒是希伯的儿子；希伯是沙拉的儿子；
chapters.en: Which was of Saruch, which was of Ragau, which was of Phalec, which was of Heber, which was of Sala,

chapters.zh: 沙拉是该南的儿子；该南是亚法撒的儿子；亚法撒是闪的儿子；闪是挪亚的儿子；挪亚是拉麦的儿子；
chapters.en: Which was of Cainan, which was of Arphaxad, which was of Sem, which was of Noe, which was of Lamech,

chapters.zh: 拉麦是玛土撒拉的儿子；玛土撒拉是以诺的儿子；以诺是雅列的儿子；雅列是玛勒列的儿子；玛勒列是该南的儿子；该南是以挪士的儿子；
chapters.en: Which was of Mathusala, which was of Enoch, which was of Jared, which was of Maleleel, which was of Cainan,

chapters.zh: 以挪士是塞特的儿子；塞特是亚当的儿子；亚当是神的儿子。
chapters.en: Which was of Enos, which was of Seth, which was of Adam, which was of God.

chapters.zh: 耶稣被圣灵充满，从约但河回来，圣灵将他引到旷野，四十天受魔鬼的试探。
chapters.en: And Jesus being full of the Holy Ghost returned from Jordan, and was led by the Spirit into the wilderness,

chapters.zh: 那些日子没有吃甚么；日子满了，他就饿了。
chapters.en: Being forty days tempted of the devil. And in those days he did eat nothing: and when they were ended, he afterward hungered.

chapters.zh: 魔鬼对他说：你若是神的儿子，可以吩咐这块石头变成食物。
chapters.en: And the devil said unto him, If thou be the Son of God, command this stone that it be made bread.

chapters.zh: 耶稣回答说：经上记著说：人活著不是单靠食物，乃是靠神口里所出的一切话。
chapters.en: And Jesus answered him, saying, It is written, That man shall not live by bread alone, but by every word of God.

chapters.zh: 魔鬼又领他上了高山，霎时间把天下的万国都指给他看，
chapters.en: And the devil, taking him up into an high mountain, shewed unto him all the kingdoms of the world in a moment of time.

chapters.zh: 对他说：这一切权柄、荣华，我都要给你，因为这原是交付我的，我愿意给谁就给谁。
chapters.en: And the devil said unto him, All this power will I give thee, and the glory of them: for that is delivered unto me; and to whomsoever I will I give it.

chapters.zh: 你若在我面前下拜，这都要归你。
chapters.en: If thou therefore wilt worship me, all shall be thine.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：经上记著说：当拜主 ─ 你的神，单要事奉他。
chapters.en: And Jesus answered and said unto him, Get thee behind me, Satan: for it is written, Thou shalt worship the Lord thy God, and him only shalt thou serve.

chapters.zh: 魔鬼又领他到耶路撒冷去，叫他站在殿顶（顶：原文是翅）上，对他说：你若是神的儿子，可以从这里跳下去；
chapters.en: And he brought him to Jerusalem, and set him on a pinnacle of the temple, and said unto him, If thou be the Son of God, cast thyself down from hence:

chapters.zh: 因为经上记著说：主要为你吩咐他的使者保护你；
chapters.en: For it is written, He shall give his angels charge over thee, to keep thee:

chapters.zh: 他们要用手托著你，免得你的脚碰在石头上。
chapters.en: And in hands they shall bear thee up, lest at any time thou dash thy foot against a stone.

chapters.zh: 耶稣对他说：经上说：不可试探主 ─ 你的神。
chapters.en: And Jesus answering said unto him, It is said, Thou shalt not tempt the Lord thy God.

chapters.zh: 魔鬼用完了各样的试探，就暂时离开耶稣。
chapters.en: And when the devil had ended all the temptation, he departed from him for a season.

chapters.zh: 耶稣满有圣灵的能力，回到加利利；他的名声就传遍了四方。
chapters.en: And Jesus returned in the power of the Spirit into Galilee: and there went out a fame of him through all the region round about.

chapters.zh: 他在各会堂里教训人，众人都称赞他。
chapters.en: And he taught in their synagogues, being glorified of all.

chapters.zh: 耶稣来到拿撒勒，就是他长大的地方。在安息日，照他平常的规矩进了会堂，站起来要念圣经。
chapters.en: And he came to Nazareth, where he had been brought up: and, as his custom was, he went into the synagogue on the sabbath day, and stood up for to read.

chapters.zh: 有人把先知以赛亚的书交给他，他就打开，找到一处写著说：
chapters.en: And there was delivered unto him the book of the prophet Esaias. And when he had opened the book, he found the place where it was written,

chapters.zh: 主的灵在我身上，因为他用膏膏我，叫我传福音给贫穷的人；差遣我报告：被掳的得释放，瞎眼的得看见，叫那受压制的得自由，
chapters.en: The Spirit of the Lord upon me, because he hath anointed me to preach the gospel to the poor; he hath sent me to heal the brokenhearted, to preach deliverance to the captives, and recovering of sight to the blind, to set at liberty them that are bruised,

chapters.zh: 报告神悦纳人的禧年。
chapters.en: To preach the acceptable year of the Lord.

chapters.zh: 于是把书卷起来，交还执事，就坐下。会堂里的人都定睛看他。
chapters.en: And he closed the book, and he gave again to the minister, and sat down. And the eyes of all them that were in the synagogue were fastened on him.

chapters.zh: 耶稣对他们说：今天这经应验在你们耳中了。
chapters.en: And he began to say unto them, This day is this scripture fulfilled in your ears.

chapters.zh: 众人都称赞他，并希奇他口中所出的恩言；又说：这不是约瑟的儿子么？
chapters.en: And all bare him witness, and wondered at the gracious words which proceeded out of his mouth. And they said, Is not this Joseph's son?

chapters.zh: 耶稣对他们说：你们必引这俗语向我说：医生，你医治自己罢！我们听见你在迦百农所行的事，也当行在你自己家乡里；
chapters.en: And he said unto them, Ye will surely say unto me this proverb, Physician, heal thyself: whatsoever we have heard done in Capernaum, do also here in thy country.

chapters.zh: 又说：我实在告诉你们，没有先知在自己家乡被人悦纳的。
chapters.en: And he said, Verily I say unto you, No prophet is accepted in his own country.

chapters.zh: 我对你们说实话，当以利亚的时候，天闭塞了三年零六个月，遍地有大饥荒，那时，以色列中有许多寡妇，
chapters.en: But I tell you of a truth, many widows were in Israel in the days of Elias, when the heaven was shut up three years and six months, when great famine was throughout all the land;

chapters.zh: 以利亚并没有奉差往他们一个人那里去，只奉差往西顿的撒勒法一个寡妇那里去。
chapters.en: But unto none of them was Elias sent, save unto Sarepta, of Sidon, unto a woman a widow.

chapters.zh: 先知以利沙的时候，以色列中有许多长大痲疯的，但内中除了叙利亚国的乃缦，没有一个得洁净的。
chapters.en: And many lepers were in Israel in the time of Eliseus the prophet; and none of them was cleansed, saving Naaman the Syrian.

chapters.zh: 会堂里的人听见这话，都怒气满胸，
chapters.en: And all they in the synagogue, when they heard these things, were filled with wrath,

chapters.zh: 就起来撵他出城，他们的城造在山上；他们带他到山崖，要把他推下去。
chapters.en: And rose up, and thrust him out of the city, and led him unto the brow of the hill whereon their city was built, that they might cast him down headlong.

chapters.zh: 他却从他们中间直行，过去了。
chapters.en: But he passing through the midst of them went his way,

chapters.zh: 耶稣下到迦百农，就是加利利的一座城，在安息日教训众人。
chapters.en: And came down to Capernaum, a city of Galilee, and taught them on the sabbath days.

chapters.zh: 他们很希奇他的教训，因为他的话里有权柄。
chapters.en: And they were astonished at his doctrine: for his word was with power.

chapters.zh: 在会堂里有一个人，被污鬼的精气附著，大声喊叫说：
chapters.en: And in the synagogue there was a man, which had a spirit of an unclean devil, and cried out with a loud voice,

chapters.zh: 唉！拿撒勒的耶稣，我们与你有甚么相干？你来灭我们么？我知道你是谁，乃是神的圣者。
chapters.en: Saying, Let alone; what have we to do with thee, Jesus of Nazareth? art thou come to destroy us? I know thee who thou art; the Holy One of God.

chapters.zh: 耶稣责备他说：不要作声，从这人身上出来罢！鬼把那人摔倒在众人中间，就出来了，却也没有害他。
chapters.en: And Jesus rebuked him, saying, Hold thy peace, and come out of him. And when the devil had thrown him in the midst, he came out of him, and hurt him not.

chapters.zh: 众人都惊讶，彼此对问说：这是甚么道理呢？因为他用权柄能力吩咐污鬼，污鬼就出来。
chapters.en: And they were all amazed, and spake among themselves, saying, What a word this! for with authority and power he commandeth the unclean spirits, and they come out.

chapters.zh: 于是耶稣的名声传遍了周围地方。
chapters.en: And the fame of him went out into every place of the country round about.

chapters.zh: 耶稣出了会堂，进了西门的家。西门的岳母害热病甚重，有人为他求耶稣。
chapters.en: And he arose out of the synagogue, and entered into Simon's house. And Simon's wife's mother was taken with a great fever; and they besought him for her.

chapters.zh: 耶稣站在他旁边，斥责那热病，热就退了。他立刻起来服事他们。
chapters.en: And he stood over her, and rebuked the fever; and it left her: and immediately she arose and ministered unto them.

chapters.zh: 日落的时候，凡有病人的，不论害甚么病，都带到耶稣那里。耶稣按手在他们各人身上，医好他们。
chapters.en: Now when the sun was setting, all they that had any sick with divers diseases brought them unto him; and he laid his hands on every one of them, and healed them.

chapters.zh: 又有鬼从好些人身上出来，喊著说：你是神的儿子。耶稣斥责他们，不许他们说话。因为他们知道他是基督。
chapters.en: And devils also came out of many, crying out, and saying, Thou art Christ the Son of God. And he rebuking suffered them not to speak: for they knew that he was Christ.

chapters.zh: 天亮的时候，耶稣出来，走到旷野地方。众人去找他，到了他那里，要留住他，不要他离开他们。
chapters.en: And when it was day, he departed and went into a desert place: and the people sought him, and came unto him, and stayed him, that he should not depart from them.

chapters.zh: 但耶稣对他们说：我也必须在别城传神国的福音，因我奉差原是为此。
chapters.en: And he said unto them, I must preach the kingdom of God to other cities also: for therefore am I sent.

chapters.zh: 于是耶稣在加利利的各会堂传道。
chapters.en: And he preached in the synagogues of Galilee.

chapters.zh: 耶稣站在革尼撒勒湖边，众人拥挤他，要听神的道。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, that, as the people pressed upon him to hear the word of God, he stood by the lake of Gennesaret,

chapters.zh: 他见有两只船湾在湖边；打鱼的人却离开船洗网去了。
chapters.en: And saw two ships standing by the lake: but the fishermen were gone out of them, and were washing nets.

chapters.zh: 有一只船是西门的，耶稣就上去，请他把船撑开，稍微离岸，就坐下，从船上教训众人。
chapters.en: And he entered into one of the ships, which was Simon's, and prayed him that he would thrust out a little from the land. And he sat down, and taught the people out of the ship.

chapters.zh: 讲完了，对西门说：把船开到水深之处，下网打鱼。
chapters.en: Now when he had left speaking, he said unto Simon, Launch out into the deep, and let down your nets for a draught.

chapters.zh: 西门说：夫子，我们整夜劳力，并没有打著甚么。但依从你的话，我就下网。
chapters.en: And Simon answering said unto him, Master, we have toiled all the night, and have taken nothing: nevertheless at thy word I will let down the net.

chapters.zh: 他们下了网，就圈住许多鱼，网险些裂开，
chapters.en: And when they had this done, they inclosed a great multitude of fishes: and their net brake.

chapters.zh: 便招呼那只船上的同伴来帮助。他们就来，把鱼装满了两只船，甚至船要沉下去。
chapters.en: And they beckoned unto partners, which were in the other ship, that they should come and help them. And they came, and filled both the ships, so that they began to sink.

chapters.zh: 西门彼得看见，就俯伏在耶稣膝前，说：主阿！离开我，我是个罪人！
chapters.en: When Simon Peter saw , he fell down at Jesus' knees, saying, Depart from me; for I am a sinful man, O Lord.

chapters.zh: 他和一切同在的人都惊讶这一网所打的鱼。
chapters.en: For he was astonished, and all that were with him, at the draught of the fishes which they had taken:

chapters.zh: 他的伙伴西庇太的儿子雅各、约翰，也是这样。耶稣对西门说：不要怕！从今以后，你要得人了。
chapters.en: And so also James, and John, the sons of Zebedee, which were partners with Simon. And Jesus said unto Simon, Fear not; from henceforth thou shalt catch men.

chapters.zh: 他们把两只船拢了岸，就撇下所有的，跟从了耶稣。
chapters.en: And when they had brought their ships to land, they forsook all, and followed him.

chapters.zh: 有一回，耶稣在一个城里，有人满身长了大痲疯，看见他，就俯伏在地，求他说：主若肯，必能叫我洁净了。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when he was in a certain city, behold a man full of leprosy: who seeing Jesus fell on face, and besought him, saying, Lord, if thou wilt, thou canst make me clean.

chapters.zh: 耶稣伸手摸他，说：我肯，你洁净了罢！大痲疯立刻就离了他的身。
chapters.en: And he put forth hand, and touched him, saying, I will: be thou clean. And immediately the leprosy departed from him.

chapters.zh: 耶稣嘱咐他：你切不可告诉人，只要去把身体给祭司察看，又要为你得了洁净，照摩西所吩咐的献上礼物，对众人作证据。
chapters.en: And he charged him to tell no man: but go, and shew thyself to the priest, and offer for thy cleansing, according as Moses commanded, for a testimony unto them.

chapters.zh: 但耶稣的名声越发传扬出去。有极多的人聚集来听道，也指望医治他们的病。
chapters.en: But so much the more went there a fame abroad of him: and great multitudes came together to hear, and to be healed by him of their infirmities.

chapters.zh: 耶稣却退到旷野去祷告。
chapters.en: And he withdrew himself into the wilderness, and prayed.

chapters.zh: 有一天，耶稣教训人，有法利赛人和教法师在旁边坐著；他们是从加利利各乡村和犹太并耶路撒冷来的。主的能力与耶稣同在，使他能医治病人。
chapters.en: And it came to pass on a certain day, as he was teaching, that there were Pharisees and doctors of the law sitting by, which were come out of every town of Galilee, and Judaea, and Jerusalem: and the power of the Lord was to heal them.

chapters.zh: 有人用褥子抬著一个瘫子，要抬进去放在耶稣面前，
chapters.en: And, behold, men brought in a bed a man which was taken with a palsy: and they sought to bring him in, and to lay before him.

chapters.zh: 却因人多，寻不出法子抬进去，就上了房顶，从瓦间把他连褥子缒到当中，正在耶稣面前。
chapters.en: And when they could not find by what they might bring him in because of the multitude, they went upon the housetop, and let him down through the tiling with couch into the midst before Jesus.

chapters.zh: 耶稣见他们的信心，就对瘫子说：你的罪赦了。
chapters.en: And when he saw their faith, he said unto him, Man, thy sins are forgiven thee.

chapters.zh: 文士和法利赛人就议论说：这说僭妄话的是谁？除了神以外，谁能赦罪呢？
chapters.en: And the scribes and the Pharisees began to reason, saying, Who is this which speaketh blasphemies? Who can forgive sins, but God alone?

chapters.zh: 耶稣知道他们所议论的，就说：你们心里议论的是甚么呢？
chapters.en: But when Jesus perceived their thoughts, he answering said unto them, What reason ye in your hearts?

chapters.zh: 或说你的罪赦了，或说你起来行走，那一样容易呢？
chapters.en: Whether is easier, to say, Thy sins be forgiven thee; or to say, Rise up and walk?

chapters.zh: 但要叫你们知道，人子在地上有赦罪的权柄。就对瘫子说：我吩咐你，起来，拿你的褥子回家去罢！
chapters.en: But that ye may know that the Son of man hath power upon earth to forgive sins, (he said unto the sick of the palsy,) I say unto thee, Arise, and take up thy couch, and go into thine house.

chapters.zh: 那人当众人面前立刻起来，拿著他所躺卧的褥子回家去，归荣耀与神。
chapters.en: And immediately he rose up before them, and took up that whereon he lay, and departed to his own house, glorifying God.

chapters.zh: 众人都惊奇，也归荣耀与神，并且满心惧怕，说：我们今日看见非常的事了。
chapters.en: And they were all amazed, and they glorified God, and were filled with fear, saying, We have seen strange things to day.

chapters.zh: 这事以后，耶稣出去，看见一个税吏，名叫利未，坐在税关上，就对他说：你跟从我来。
chapters.en: And after these things he went forth, and saw a publican, named Levi, sitting at the receipt of custom: and he said unto him, Follow me.

chapters.zh: 他就撇下所有的，起来，跟从了耶稣。
chapters.en: And he left all, rose up, and followed him.

chapters.zh: 利未在自己家里为耶稣大摆筵席，有许多税吏和别人与他们一同坐席。
chapters.en: And Levi made him a great feast in his own house: and there was a great company of publicans and of others that sat down with them.

chapters.zh: 法利赛人和文士就向耶稣的门徒发怨言说：你们为甚么和税吏并罪人一同吃喝呢？
chapters.en: But their scribes and Pharisees murmured against his disciples, saying, Why do ye eat and drink with publicans and sinners?

chapters.zh: 耶稣对他们说：无病的人用不著医生；有病的人才用得著。
chapters.en: And Jesus answering said unto them, They that are whole need not a physician; but they that are sick.

chapters.zh: 我来本不是召义人悔改，乃是召罪人悔改。
chapters.en: I came not to call the righteous, but sinners to repentance.

chapters.zh: 他们说：约翰的门徒屡次禁食祈祷，法利赛人的门徒也是这样；惟独你的门徒又吃又喝。
chapters.en: And they said unto him, Why do the disciples of John fast often, and make prayers, and likewise of the Pharisees; but thine eat and drink?

chapters.zh: 耶稣对他们说：新郎和陪伴之人同在的时候，岂能叫陪伴之人禁食呢？
chapters.en: And he said unto them, Can ye make the children of the bridechamber fast, while the bridegroom is with them?

chapters.zh: 但日子将到，新郎要离开他们，那日他们就要禁食了。
chapters.en: But the days will come, when the bridegroom shall be taken away from them, and then shall they fast in those days.

chapters.zh: 耶稣又设一个比喻，对他们说：没有人把新衣服撕下一块来补在旧衣服上；若是这样，就把新的撕破了，并且所撕下来的那块新的和旧的也不相称。
chapters.en: And he spake also a parable unto them; No man putteth a piece of a new garment upon an old; if otherwise, then both the new maketh a rent, and the piece that was out of the new agreeth not with the old.

chapters.zh: 也没有人把新酒装在旧皮袋里；若是这样，新酒必将皮袋裂开，酒便漏出来，皮袋也就坏了。
chapters.en: And no man putteth new wine into old bottles; else the new wine will burst the bottles, and be spilled, and the bottles shall perish.

chapters.zh: 但新酒必须装在新皮袋里。
chapters.en: But new wine must be put into new bottles; and both are preserved.

chapters.zh: 没有人喝了陈酒又想喝新的；他总说陈的好。
chapters.en: No man also having drunk old straightway desireth new: for he saith, The old is better.

chapters.zh: 有一个安息日，耶稣从麦地经过。他的门徒掐了麦穗，用手搓著吃。
chapters.en: And it came to pass on the second sabbath after the first, that he went through the corn fields; and his disciples plucked the ears of corn, and did eat, rubbing in hands.

chapters.zh: 有几个法利赛人说：你们为甚么作安息日不可作的事呢？
chapters.en: And certain of the Pharisees said unto them, Why do ye that which is not lawful to do on the sabbath days?

chapters.zh: 耶稣对他们说：经上记著大卫和跟从他的人饥饿之时所作的事，连这个你们也没有念过么？
chapters.en: And Jesus answering them said, Have ye not read so much as this, what David did, when himself was an hungred, and they which were with him;

chapters.zh: 他怎么进了神的殿，拿陈设饼吃，又给跟从的人吃？这饼除了祭司以外，别人都不可吃。
chapters.en: How he went into the house of God, and did take and eat the shewbread, and gave also to them that were with him; which it is not lawful to eat but for the priests alone?

chapters.zh: 又对他们说：人子是安息日的主。
chapters.en: And he said unto them, That the Son of man is Lord also of the sabbath.

chapters.zh: 又有一个安息日，耶稣进了会堂教训人，在那里有一个人右手枯干了。
chapters.en: And it came to pass also on another sabbath, that he entered into the synagogue and taught: and there was a man whose right hand was withered.

chapters.zh: 文士和法利赛人窥探耶稣，在安息日治病不治病，要得把柄去告他。
chapters.en: And the scribes and Pharisees watched him, whether he would heal on the sabbath day; that they might find an accusation against him.

chapters.zh: 耶稣却知道他们的意念，就对那枯干一只手的人说：起来！站在当中。那人就起来，站著。
chapters.en: But he knew their thoughts, and said to the man which had the withered hand, Rise up, and stand forth in the midst. And he arose and stood forth.

chapters.zh: 耶稣对他们说：我问你们，在安息日行善行恶，救命害命，那样是可以的呢？
chapters.en: Then said Jesus unto them, I will ask you one thing; Is it lawful on the sabbath days to do good, or to do evil? to save life, or to destroy ?

chapters.zh: 他就周围看著他们众人，对那人说：伸出手来！他把手一伸，手就复了原。
chapters.en: And looking round about upon them all, he said unto the man, Stretch forth thy hand. And he did so: and his hand was restored whole as the other.

chapters.zh: 他们就满心大怒，彼此商议怎样处治耶稣。
chapters.en: And they were filled with madness; and communed one with another what they might do to Jesus.

chapters.zh: 那时，耶稣出去，上山祷告，整夜祷告神；
chapters.en: And it came to pass in those days, that he went out into a mountain to pray, and continued all night in prayer to God.

chapters.zh: 到了天亮，叫他的门徒来，就从他们中间挑选十二个人，称他们为使徒。
chapters.en: And when it was day, he called his disciples: and of them he chose twelve, whom also he named apostles;

chapters.zh: 这十二个人有西门，耶稣又给他起名叫彼得，还有他兄弟安得烈，又有雅各和约翰，腓力和巴多罗买，
chapters.en: Simon, (whom he also named Peter,) and Andrew his brother, James and John, Philip and Bartholomew,

chapters.zh: 马太和多马，亚勒腓的儿子雅各和奋锐党的西门，
chapters.en: Matthew and Thomas, James the of Alphaeus, and Simon called Zelotes,

chapters.zh: 雅各的儿子（或作：兄弟）犹大，和卖主的加略人犹大。
chapters.en: And Judas of James, and Judas Iscariot, which also was the traitor.

chapters.zh: 耶稣和他们下了山，站在一块平地上；同站的有许多门徒，又有许多百姓，从犹太全地和耶路撒冷，并推罗、西顿的海边来，都要听他讲道，又指望医治他们的病；
chapters.en: And he came down with them, and stood in the plain, and the company of his disciples, and a great multitude of people out of all Judaea and Jerusalem, and from the sea coast of Tyre and Sidon, which came to hear him, and to be healed of their diseases;

chapters.zh: 还有被污鬼缠磨的，也得了医治。
chapters.en: And they that were vexed with unclean spirits: and they were healed.

chapters.zh: 众人都想要摸他；因为有能力从他身上发出来，医好了他们。
chapters.en: And the whole multitude sought to touch him: for there went virtue out of him, and healed all.

chapters.zh: 耶稣举目看著门徒，说：你们贫穷的人有福了！因为神的国是你们的。
chapters.en: And he lifted up his eyes on his disciples, and said, Blessed poor: for yours is the kingdom of God.

chapters.zh: 你们饥饿的人有福了！因为你们将要饱足。你们哀哭的人有福了！因为你们将要喜笑。
chapters.en: Blessed that hunger now: for ye shall be filled. Blessed that weep now: for ye shall laugh.

chapters.zh: 人为人子恨恶你们，拒绝你们，辱骂你们，弃掉你们的名，以为是恶，你们就有福了！
chapters.en: Blessed are ye, when men shall hate you, and when they shall separate you , and shall reproach , and cast out your name as evil, for the Son of man's sake.

chapters.zh: 当那日，你们要欢喜跳跃，因为你们在天上的赏赐是大的。他们的祖宗待先知也是这样。
chapters.en: Rejoice ye in that day, and leap for joy: for, behold, your reward great in heaven: for in the like manner did their fathers unto the prophets.

chapters.zh: 但你们富足的人有祸了！因为你们受过你们的安慰。
chapters.en: But woe unto you that are rich! for ye have received your consolation.

chapters.zh: 你们饱足的人有祸了！因为你们将要饥饿。你们喜笑的人有祸了！因为你们将要哀恸哭泣。
chapters.en: Woe unto you that are full! for ye shall hunger. Woe unto you that laugh now! for ye shall mourn and weep.

chapters.zh: 人都说你们好的时候，你们就有祸了！因为他们的祖宗待假先知也是这样。
chapters.en: Woe unto you, when all men shall speak well of you! for so did their fathers to the false prophets.

chapters.zh: 只是我告诉你们这听道的人，你们的仇敌，要爱他！恨你们的，要待他好！
chapters.en: But I say unto you which hear, Love your enemies, do good to them which hate you,

chapters.zh: 咒诅你们的，要为他祝福！凌辱你们的，要为他祷告！
chapters.en: Bless them that curse you, and pray for them which despitefully use you.

chapters.zh: 有人打你这边的脸，连那边的脸也由他打。有人夺你的外衣，连里衣也由他拿去。
chapters.en: And unto him that smiteth thee on the cheek offer also the other; and him that taketh away thy cloke forbid not coat also.

chapters.zh: 凡求你的，就给他。有人夺你的东西去，不用再要回来。
chapters.en: Give to every man that asketh of thee; and of him that taketh away thy goods ask not again.

chapters.zh: 你们愿意人怎样待你们，你们也要怎样待人。
chapters.en: And as ye would that men should do to you, do ye also to them likewise.

chapters.zh: 你们若单爱那爱你们的人，有甚么可酬谢的呢？就是罪人也爱那爱他们的人。
chapters.en: For if ye love them which love you, what thank have ye? for sinners also love those that love them.

chapters.zh: 你们若善待那善待你们的人，有甚么可酬谢的呢？就是罪人也是这样行。
chapters.en: And if ye do good to them which do good to you, what thank have ye? for sinners also do even the same.

chapters.zh: 你们若借给人，指望从他收回，有甚么可酬谢的呢？就是罪人也借给罪人，要如数收回。
chapters.en: And if ye lend of whom ye hope to receive, what thank have ye? for sinners also lend to sinners, to receive as much again.

chapters.zh: 你们倒要爱仇敌，也要善待他们，并要借给人不指望偿还，你们的赏赐就必大了，你们也必作至高者的儿子；因为他恩待那忘恩的和作恶的。
chapters.en: But love ye your enemies, and do good, and lend, hoping for nothing again; and your reward shall be great, and ye shall be the children of the Highest: for he is kind unto the unthankful and the evil.

chapters.zh: 你们要慈悲，像你们的父慈悲一样。
chapters.en: Be ye therefore merciful, as your Father also is merciful.

chapters.zh: 你们不要论断人，就不被论断；你们不要定人的罪，就不被定罪；你们要饶恕人，就必蒙饶恕（饶恕：原文作释放）；
chapters.en: Judge not, and ye shall not be judged: condemn not, and ye shall not be condemned: forgive, and ye shall be forgiven:

chapters.zh: 你们要给人，就必有给你们的，并且用十足的升斗，连摇带按，上尖下流的倒在你们怀里；因为你们用甚么量器量给人，也必用甚么量器量给你们。
chapters.en: Give, and it shall be given unto you; good measure, pressed down, and shaken together, and running over, shall men give into your bosom. For with the same measure that ye mete withal it shall be measured to you again.

chapters.zh: 耶稣又用比喻对他们说：瞎子岂能领瞎子，两个人不是都要掉在坑里么？
chapters.en: And he spake a parable unto them, Can the blind lead the blind? shall they not both fall into the ditch?

chapters.zh: 学生不能高过先生；凡学成了的不过和先生一样。
chapters.en: The disciple is not above his master: but every one that is perfect shall be as his master.

chapters.zh: 为甚么看见你弟兄眼中有刺，却不想自己眼中有梁木呢？
chapters.en: And why beholdest thou the mote that is in thy brother's eye, but perceivest not the beam that is in thine own eye?

chapters.zh: 你不见自己眼中有梁木，怎能对你弟兄说：容我去掉你眼中的刺呢？你这假冒为善的人！先去掉自己眼中的梁木，然后才能看得清楚，去掉你弟兄眼中的刺。
chapters.en: Either how canst thou say to thy brother, Brother, let me pull out the mote that is in thine eye, when thou thyself beholdest not the beam that is in thine own eye? Thou hypocrite, cast out first the beam out of thine own eye, and then shalt thou see clearly to pull out the mote that is in thy brother's eye.

chapters.zh: 因为，没有好树结坏果子，也没有坏树结好果子。
chapters.en: For a good tree bringeth not forth corrupt fruit; neither doth a corrupt tree bring forth good fruit.

chapters.zh: 凡树木看果子，就可以认出他来。人不是从荆棘上摘无花果，也不是从蒺藜里摘葡萄。
chapters.en: For every tree is known by his own fruit. For of thorns men do not gather figs, nor of a bramble bush gather they grapes.

chapters.zh: 善人从他心里所存的善就发出善来；恶人从他心里所存的恶就发出恶来；因为心里所充满的，口里就说出来。
chapters.en: A good man out of the good treasure of his heart bringeth forth that which is good; and an evil man out of the evil treasure of his heart bringeth forth that which is evil: for of the abundance of the heart his mouth speaketh.

chapters.zh: 你们为甚么称呼我主阿，主阿，却不遵我的话行呢？
chapters.en: And why call ye me, Lord, Lord, and do not the things which I say?

chapters.zh: 凡到我这里来，听见我的话就去行的，我要告诉你们他像甚么人：
chapters.en: Whosoever cometh to me, and heareth my sayings, and doeth them, I will shew you to whom he is like:

chapters.zh: 他像一个人盖房子，深深的挖地，把根基安在磐石上；到发大水的时候，水冲那房子，房子总不能摇动，因为根基立在磐石上（有古卷：因为盖造得好）。
chapters.en: He is like a man which built an house, and digged deep, and laid the foundation on a rock: and when the flood arose, the stream beat vehemently upon that house, and could not shake it: for it was founded upon a rock.

chapters.zh: 惟有听见不去行的，就像一个人在土地上盖房子，没有根基；水一冲，随即倒塌了，并且那房子坏的很大。
chapters.en: But he that heareth, and doeth not, is like a man that without a foundation built an house upon the earth; against which the stream did beat vehemently, and immediately it fell; and the ruin of that house was great.

chapters.zh: 耶稣对百姓讲完了这一切的话，就进了迦百农。
chapters.en: Now when he had ended all his sayings in the audience of the people, he entered into Capernaum.

chapters.zh: 有一个百夫长所宝贵的仆人害病，快要死了。
chapters.en: And a certain centurion's servant, who was dear unto him, was sick, and ready to die.

chapters.zh: 百夫长风闻耶稣的事，就托犹太人的几个长老去求耶稣来救他的仆人。
chapters.en: And when he heard of Jesus, he sent unto him the elders of the Jews, beseeching him that he would come and heal his servant.

chapters.zh: 他们到了耶稣那里，就切切的求他说：你给他行这事是他所配得的；
chapters.en: And when they came to Jesus, they besought him instantly, saying, That he was worthy for whom he should do this:

chapters.zh: 因为他爱我们的百姓，给我们建造会堂。
chapters.en: For he loveth our nation, and he hath built us a synagogue.

chapters.zh: 耶稣就和他们同去。离那家不远，百夫长托几个朋友去见耶稣，对他说：主阿！不要劳动；因你到我舍下，我不敢当。
chapters.en: Then Jesus went with them. And when he was now not far from the house, the centurion sent friends to him, saying unto him, Lord, trouble not thyself: for I am not worthy that thou shouldest enter under my roof:

chapters.zh: 我也自以为不配去见你，只要你说一句话，我的仆人就必好了。
chapters.en: Wherefore neither thought I myself worthy to come unto thee: but say in a word, and my servant shall be healed.

chapters.zh: 因为我在人的权下，也有兵在我以下，对这个说：去！他就去；对那个说：来！他就来；对我的仆人说：你作这事！他就去作。
chapters.en: For I also am a man set under authority, having under me soldiers, and I say unto one, Go, and he goeth; and to another, Come, and he cometh; and to my servant, Do this, and he doeth .

chapters.zh: 耶稣听见这话，就希奇他，转身对跟随的众人说：我告诉你们，这么大的信心，就是在以色列中，我也没有遇见过。
chapters.en: When Jesus heard these things, he marvelled at him, and turned him about, and said unto the people that followed him, I say unto you, I have not found so great faith, no, not in Israel.

chapters.zh: 那托来的人回到百夫长家里，看见仆人已经好了。
chapters.en: And they that were sent, returning to the house, found the servant whole that had been sick.

chapters.zh: 过了不多时（有古卷：次日），耶稣往一座城去，这城名叫拿因，他的门徒和极多的人与他同行。
chapters.en: And it came to pass the day after, that he went into a city called Nain; and many of his disciples went with him, and much people.

chapters.zh: 将近城门，有一个死人被抬出来。这人是他母亲独生的儿子；他母亲又是寡妇。有城里的许多人同著寡妇送殡。
chapters.en: Now when he came nigh to the gate of the city, behold, there was a dead man carried out, the only son of his mother, and she was a widow: and much people of the city was with her.

chapters.zh: 主看见那寡妇，就怜悯他，对他说：不要哭！
chapters.en: And when the Lord saw her, he had compassion on her, and said unto her, Weep not.

chapters.zh: 于是进前按著杠，抬的人就站住了。耶稣说：少年人，我吩咐你，起来！
chapters.en: And he came and touched the bier: and they that bare stood still. And he said, Young man, I say unto thee, Arise.

chapters.zh: 那死人就坐起，并且说话。耶稣便把他交给他母亲。
chapters.en: And he that was dead sat up, and began to speak. And he delivered him to his mother.

chapters.zh: 众人都惊奇，归荣耀与神，说：有大先知在我们中间兴起来了！又说：神眷顾了他的百姓！
chapters.en: And there came a fear on all: and they glorified God, saying, That a great prophet is risen up among us; and, That God hath visited his people.

chapters.zh: 他这事的风声就传遍了犹太和周围地方。
chapters.en: And this rumour of him went forth throughout all Judaea, and throughout all the region round about.

chapters.zh: 约翰的门徒把这些事都告诉约翰。
chapters.en: And the disciples of John shewed him of all these things.

chapters.zh: 他便叫了两个门徒来，打发他们到主那里去，说：那将要来的是你么？还是我们等候别人呢？
chapters.en: And John calling two of his disciples sent to Jesus, saying, Art thou he that should come? or look we for another?

chapters.zh: 那两个人来到耶稣那里，说：施洗的约翰打发我们来问你：那将要来的是你么？还是我们等候别人呢？
chapters.en: When the men were come unto him, they said, John Baptist hath sent us unto thee, saying, Art thou he that should come? or look we for another?

chapters.zh: 正当那时候，耶稣治好了许多有疾病的，受灾患的，被恶鬼附著的，又开恩叫好些瞎子能看见。
chapters.en: And in that same hour he cured many of infirmities and plagues, and of evil spirits; and unto many blind he gave sight.

chapters.zh: 耶稣回答说：你们去，把所看见所听见的事告诉约翰，就是瞎子看见，瘸子行走，长大痲疯的洁净，聋子听见，死人复活，穷人有福音传给他们。
chapters.en: Then Jesus answering said unto them, Go your way, and tell John what things ye have seen and heard; how that the blind see, the lame walk, the lepers are cleansed, the deaf hear, the dead are raised, to the poor the gospel is preached.

chapters.zh: 凡不因我跌倒的，就有福了！
chapters.en: And blessed is , whosoever shall not be offended in me.

chapters.zh: 约翰所差来的人既走了，耶稣就对众人讲论约翰说：你们从前出去到旷野，是要看甚么呢？要看风吹动的芦苇么？
chapters.en: And when the messengers of John were departed, he began to speak unto the people concerning John, What went ye out into the wilderness for to see? A reed shaken with the wind?

chapters.zh: 你们出去，到底是要看甚么？要看穿细软衣服的人么？那穿华丽衣服、宴乐度日的人是在王宫里。
chapters.en: But what went ye out for to see? A man clothed in soft raiment? Behold, they which are gorgeously apparelled, and live delicately, are in kings' courts.

chapters.zh: 你们出去，究竟是要看甚么？要看先知么？我告诉你们，是的，他比先知大多了。
chapters.en: But what went ye out for to see? A prophet? Yea, I say unto you, and much more than a prophet.

chapters.zh: 经上记著说：我要差遣我的使者在你前面预备道路，所说的就是这个人。
chapters.en: This is , of whom it is written, Behold, I send my messenger before thy face, which shall prepare thy way before thee.

chapters.zh: 我告诉你们，凡妇人所生的，没有一个大过约翰的；然而神国里最小的比他还大。
chapters.en: For I say unto you, Among those that are born of women there is not a greater prophet than John the Baptist: but he that is least in the kingdom of God is greater than he.

chapters.zh: 众百姓和税吏既受过约翰的洗，听见这话，就以神为义；
chapters.en: And all the people that heard , and the publicans, justified God, being baptized with the baptism of John.

chapters.zh: 但法利赛人和律法师没有受过约翰的洗，竟为自己废弃了神的旨意。（29，30两节或作：众百姓和税吏听见了约翰的话，就受了他的洗，便以神为义；但法利赛人和律法师不受约翰的洗，竟为自己废弃了神的旨意。）
chapters.en: But the Pharisees and lawyers rejected the counsel of God against themselves, being not baptized of him.

chapters.zh: 主又说：这样，我可用甚么比这世代的人呢？他们好像甚么呢？
chapters.en: And the Lord said, Whereunto then shall I liken the men of this generation? and to what are they like?

chapters.zh: 好像孩童坐在街市上，彼此呼叫说：我们向你们吹笛，你们不跳舞；我们向你们举哀，你们不啼哭。
chapters.en: They are like unto children sitting in the marketplace, and calling one to another, and saying, We have piped unto you, and ye have not danced; we have mourned to you, and ye have not wept.

chapters.zh: 施洗的约翰来，不吃饼，不喝酒，你们说他是被鬼附著的。
chapters.en: For John the Baptist came neither eating bread nor drinking wine; and ye say, He hath a devil.

chapters.zh: 人子来，也吃也喝，你们说他是贪食好酒的人，是税吏和罪人的朋友。
chapters.en: The Son of man is come eating and drinking; and ye say, Behold a gluttonous man, and a winebibber, a friend of publicans and sinners!

chapters.zh: 但智慧之子都以智慧为是。
chapters.en: But wisdom is justified of all her children.

chapters.zh: 有一个法利赛人请耶稣和他吃饭；耶稣就到法利赛人家里去坐席。
chapters.en: And one of the Pharisees desired him that he would eat with him. And he went into the Pharisee's house, and sat down to meat.

chapters.zh: 那城里有一个女人，是个罪人，知道耶稣在法利赛人家里坐席，就拿著盛香膏的玉瓶，
chapters.en: And, behold, a woman in the city, which was a sinner, when she knew that sat at meat in the Pharisee's house, brought an alabaster box of ointment,

chapters.zh: 站在耶稣背后，挨著他的脚哭，眼泪湿了耶稣的脚，就用自己的头发擦干，又用嘴连连亲他的脚，把香膏抹上。
chapters.en: And stood at his feet behind weeping, and began to wash his feet with tears, and did wipe with the hairs of her head, and kissed his feet, and anointed with the ointment.

chapters.zh: 请耶稣的法利赛人看见这事，心里说：这人若是先知，必知道摸他的是谁，是个怎样的女人，乃是个罪人。
chapters.en: Now when the Pharisee which had bidden him saw , he spake within himself, saying, This man, if he were a prophet, would have known who and what manner of woman that toucheth him: for she is a sinner.

chapters.zh: 耶稣对他说：西门！我有句话要对你说。西门说：夫子，请说。
chapters.en: And Jesus answering said unto him, Simon, I have somewhat to say unto thee. And he saith, Master, say on.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：一个债主有两个人欠他的债；一个欠五十两银子，一个欠五两银子；
chapters.en: There was a certain creditor which had two debtors: the one owed five hundred pence, and the other fifty.

chapters.zh: 因为他们无力偿还，债主就开恩免了他们两个人的债。这两个人那一个更爱他呢？
chapters.en: And when they had nothing to pay, he frankly forgave them both. Tell me therefore, which of them will love him most?

chapters.zh: 西门回答说：我想是那多得恩免的人。耶稣说：你断的不错。
chapters.en: Simon answered and said, I suppose that , to whom he forgave most. And he said unto him, Thou hast rightly judged.

chapters.zh: 于是转过来向著那女人，便对西门说：你看见这女人么？我进了你的家，你没有给我水洗脚；但这女人用眼泪湿了我的脚，用头发擦干。
chapters.en: And he turned to the woman, and said unto Simon, Seest thou this woman? I entered into thine house, thou gavest me no water for my feet: but she hath washed my feet with tears, and wiped with the hairs of her head.

chapters.zh: 你没有与我亲嘴；但这女人从我进来的时候就不住的用嘴亲我的脚。
chapters.en: Thou gavest me no kiss: but this woman since the time I came in hath not ceased to kiss my feet.

chapters.zh: 你没有用油抹我的头；但这女人用香膏抹我的脚。
chapters.en: My head with oil thou didst not anoint: but this woman hath anointed my feet with ointment.

chapters.zh: 所以我告诉你，他许多的罪都赦免了，因为他的爱多；但那赦免少的，他的爱就少。
chapters.en: Wherefore I say unto thee, Her sins, which are many, are forgiven; for she loved much: but to whom little is forgiven, loveth little.

chapters.zh: 于是对那女人说：你的罪赦免了。
chapters.en: And he said unto her, Thy sins are forgiven.

chapters.zh: 同席的人心里说：这是甚么人，竟赦免人的罪呢？
chapters.en: And they that sat at meat with him began to say within themselves, Who is this that forgiveth sins also?

chapters.zh: 耶稣对那女人说：你的信救了你；平平安安的回去罢！
chapters.en: And he said to the woman, Thy faith hath saved thee; go in peace.

chapters.zh: 过了不多日，耶稣周游各城各乡传道，宣讲神国的福音。和他同去的有十二个门徒，
chapters.en: And it came to pass afterward, that he went throughout every city and village, preaching and shewing the glad tidings of the kingdom of God: and the twelve with him,

chapters.zh: 还有被恶鬼所附、被疾病所累、已经治好的几个妇女，内中有称为抹大拉的马利亚，曾有七个鬼从他身上赶出来，
chapters.en: And certain women, which had been healed of evil spirits and infirmities, Mary called Magdalene, out of whom went seven devils,

chapters.zh: 又有希律的家宰苦撒的妻子约亚拿，并苏撒拿，和好些别的妇女，都是用自己的财物供给耶稣和门徒。
chapters.en: And Joanna the wife of Chuza Herod's steward, and Susanna, and many others, which ministered unto him of their substance.

chapters.zh: 当许多人聚集、又有人从各城里出来见耶稣的时候，耶稣就用比喻说：
chapters.en: And when much people were gathered together, and were come to him out of every city, he spake by a parable:

chapters.zh: 有一个撒种的出去撒种。撒的时候，有落在路旁的，被人践踏，天上的飞鸟又来吃尽了。
chapters.en: A sower went out to sow his seed: and as he sowed, some fell by the way side; and it was trodden down, and the fowls of the air devoured it.

chapters.zh: 有落在磐石上的，一出来就枯干了，因为得不著滋润。
chapters.en: And some fell upon a rock; and as soon as it was sprung up, it withered away, because it lacked moisture.

chapters.zh: 有落在荆棘里的，荆棘一同生长，把他挤住了。
chapters.en: And some fell among thorns; and the thorns sprang up with it, and choked it.

chapters.zh: 又有落在好土里的，生长起来，结实百倍。耶稣说了这些话，就大声说：有耳可听的，就应当听！
chapters.en: And other fell on good ground, and sprang up, and bare fruit an hundredfold. And when he had said these things, he cried, He that hath ears to hear, let him hear.

chapters.zh: 门徒问耶稣说：这比喻是甚么意思呢？
chapters.en: And his disciples asked him, saying, What might this parable be?

chapters.zh: 他说：神国的奥秘只叫你们知道；至于别人，就用比喻，叫他们看也看不见，听也听不明。
chapters.en: And he said, Unto you it is given to know the mysteries of the kingdom of God: but to others in parables; that seeing they might not see, and hearing they might not understand.

chapters.zh: 这比喻乃是这样：种子就是神的道。
chapters.en: Now the parable is this: The seed is the word of God.

chapters.zh: 那些在路旁的，就是人听了道，随后魔鬼来，从他们心里把道夺去，恐怕他们信了得救 .
chapters.en: Those by the way side are they that hear; then cometh the devil, and taketh away the word out of their hearts, lest they should believe and be saved.

chapters.zh: 那些在磐石上的，就是人听道，欢喜领受，但心中没有根，不过暂时相信，及至遇见试炼就退后了。
chapters.en: They on the rock , which, when they hear, receive the word with joy; and these have no root, which for a while believe, and in time of temptation fall away.

chapters.zh: 那落在荆棘里的，就是人听了道，走开以后，被今生的思虑、钱财、宴乐挤住了，便结不出成熟的子粒来。
chapters.en: And that which fell among thorns are they, which, when they have heard, go forth, and are choked with cares and riches and pleasures of life, and bring no fruit to perfection.

chapters.zh: 那落在好土里的，就是人听了道，持守在诚实善良的心里，并且忍耐著结实。
chapters.en: But that on the good ground are they, which in an honest and good heart, having heard the word, keep , and bring forth fruit with patience.

chapters.zh: 没有人点灯用器皿盖上，或放在床底下，乃是放在灯台上，叫进来的人看见亮光。
chapters.en: No man, when he hath lighted a candle, covereth it with a vessel, or putteth under a bed; but setteth on a candlestick, that they which enter in may see the light.

chapters.zh: 因为掩藏的事没有不显出来的；隐瞒的事没有不露出来被人知道的。
chapters.en: For nothing is secret, that shall not be made manifest; neither hid, that shall not be known and come abroad.

chapters.zh: 所以，你们应当小心怎样听；因为凡有的，还要加给他；凡没有的，连他自以为有的，也要夺去。
chapters.en: Take heed therefore how ye hear: for whosoever hath, to him shall be given; and whosoever hath not, from him shall be taken even that which he seemeth to have.

chapters.zh: 耶稣的母亲和他弟兄来了，因为人多，不得到他跟前。
chapters.en: Then came to him mother and his brethren, and could not come at him for the press.

chapters.zh: 有人告诉他说：你母亲和你弟兄站在外边，要见你。
chapters.en: And it was told him which said, Thy mother and thy brethren stand without, desiring to see thee.

chapters.zh: 耶稣回答说：听了神之道而遵行的人就是我的母亲，我的弟兄了。
chapters.en: And he answered and said unto them, My mother and my brethren are these which hear the word of God, and do it.

chapters.zh: 有一天，耶稣和门徒上了船，对门徒说：我们可以渡到湖那边去。他们就开了船。
chapters.en: Now it came to pass on a certain day, that he went into a ship with his disciples: and he said unto them, Let us go over unto the other side of the lake. And they launched forth.

chapters.zh: 正行的时候，耶稣睡著了。湖上忽然起了暴风，船将满了水，甚是危险。
chapters.en: But as they sailed he fell asleep: and there came down a storm of wind on the lake; and they were filled , and were in jeopardy.

chapters.zh: 门徒来叫醒了他，说：夫子！夫子！我们丧命啦！耶稣醒了，斥责那狂风大浪；风浪就止住，平静了。
chapters.en: And they came to him, and awoke him, saying, Master, master, we perish. Then he arose, and rebuked the wind and the raging of the water: and they ceased, and there was a calm.

chapters.zh: 耶稣对他们说：你们的信心在那里呢？他们又惧怕又希奇，彼此说：这到底是谁？他吩咐风和水，连风和水也听从他了。
chapters.en: And he said unto them, Where is your faith? And they being afraid wondered, saying one to another, What manner of man is this! for he commandeth even the winds and water, and they obey him.

chapters.zh: 他们到了格拉森（有古卷：加大拉）人的地方，就是加利利的对面。
chapters.en: And they arrived at the country of the Gadarenes, which is over against Galilee.

chapters.zh: 耶稣上了岸，就有城里一个被鬼附著的人迎面而来。这个人许久不穿衣服，不住房子，只住在坟茔里。
chapters.en: And when he went forth to land, there met him out of the city a certain man, which had devils long time, and ware no clothes, neither abode in house, but in the tombs.

chapters.zh: 他见了耶稣，就俯伏在他面前，大声喊叫，说：至高神的儿子耶稣，我与你有甚么相干？求你不要叫我受苦！
chapters.en: When he saw Jesus, he cried out, and fell down before him, and with a loud voice said, What have I to do with thee, Jesus, Son of God most high? I beseech thee, torment me not.

chapters.zh: 是因耶稣曾吩咐污鬼从那人身上出来。原来这鬼屡次抓住他；他常被人看守，又被铁炼和脚镣捆锁，他竟把锁炼挣断，被鬼赶到旷野去。
chapters.en: (For he had commanded the unclean spirit to come out of the man. For oftentimes it had caught him: and he was kept bound with chains and in fetters; and he brake the bands, and was driven of the devil into the wilderness.)

chapters.zh: 耶稣问他说：你名叫甚么？他说：我名叫群；这是因为附著他的鬼多。
chapters.en: And Jesus asked him, saying, What is thy name? And he said, Legion: because many devils were entered into him.

chapters.zh: 鬼就央求耶稣，不要吩咐他们到无底坑里去。
chapters.en: And they besought him that he would not command them to go out into the deep.

chapters.zh: 那里有一大群猪在山上吃食。鬼央求耶稣，准他们进入猪里去。耶稣准了他们，
chapters.en: And there was there an herd of many swine feeding on the mountain: and they besought him that he would suffer them to enter into them. And he suffered them.

chapters.zh: 鬼就从那人出来，进入猪里去。于是那群猪闯下山崖，投在湖里淹死了。
chapters.en: Then went the devils out of the man, and entered into the swine: and the herd ran violently down a steep place into the lake, and were choked.

chapters.zh: 放猪的看见这事就逃跑了，去告诉城里和乡下的人。
chapters.en: When they that fed saw what was done, they fled, and went and told in the city and in the country.

chapters.zh: 众人出来要看是甚么事；到了耶稣那里，看见鬼所离开的那人，坐在耶稣脚前，穿著衣服，心里明白过来，他们就害怕。
chapters.en: Then they went out to see what was done; and came to Jesus, and found the man, out of whom the devils were departed, sitting at the feet of Jesus, clothed, and in his right mind: and they were afraid.

chapters.zh: 看见这事的便将被鬼附著的人怎么得救告诉他们。
chapters.en: They also which saw told them by what means he that was possessed of the devils was healed.

chapters.zh: 格拉森四围的人，因为害怕得很，都求耶稣离开他们；耶稣就上船回去了。
chapters.en: Then the whole multitude of the country of the Gadarenes round about besought him to depart from them; for they were taken with great fear: and he went up into the ship, and returned back again.

chapters.zh: 鬼所离开的那人恳求和耶稣同在；耶稣却打发他回去，说：
chapters.en: Now the man out of whom the devils were departed besought him that he might be with him: but Jesus sent him away, saying,

chapters.zh: 你回家去，传说神为你作了何等大的事。他就去，满城里传扬耶稣为他作了何等大的事。
chapters.en: Return to thine own house, and shew how great things God hath done unto thee. And he went his way, and published throughout the whole city how great things Jesus had done unto him.

chapters.zh: 耶稣回来的时候，众人迎接他，因为他们都等候他。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, that, when Jesus was returned, the people received him: for they were all waiting for him.

chapters.zh: 有一个管会堂的，名叫睚鲁，来俯伏在耶稣脚前，求耶稣到他家里去；
chapters.en: And, behold, there came a man named Jairus, and he was a ruler of the synagogue: and he fell down at Jesus' feet, and besought him that he would come into his house:

chapters.zh: 因他有一个独生女儿，约有十二岁，快要死了。耶稣去的时候，众人拥挤他。
chapters.en: For he had one only daughter, about twelve years of age, and she lay a dying. But as he went the people thronged him.

chapters.zh: 有一个女人，患了十二年的血漏，在医生手里花尽了他一切养生的，并没有一人能医好他。
chapters.en: And a woman having an issue of blood twelve years, which had spent all her living upon physicians, neither could be healed of any,

chapters.zh: 他来到耶稣背后，摸他的衣裳 䍁 子，血漏立刻就止住了。
chapters.en: Came behind , and touched the border of his garment: and immediately her issue of blood stanched.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：摸我的是谁？众人都不承认。彼得和同行的人都说：夫子，众人拥拥挤挤紧靠著你。（有古卷在此有：你还问摸我的是谁么？
chapters.en: And Jesus said, Who touched me? When all denied, Peter and they that were with him said, Master, the multitude throng thee and press , and sayest thou, Who touched me?

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：总有人摸我，因我觉得有能力从我身上出去。
chapters.en: And Jesus said, Somebody hath touched me: for I perceive that virtue is gone out of me.

chapters.zh: 那女人知道不能隐藏，就战战兢兢的来俯伏在耶稣脚前，把摸他的缘故和怎样立刻得好了，当著众人都说出来。
chapters.en: And when the woman saw that she was not hid, she came trembling, and falling down before him, she declared unto him before all the people for what cause she had touched him, and how she was healed immediately.

chapters.zh: 耶稣对他说：女儿，你的信救了你；平平安安的去罢！
chapters.en: And he said unto her, Daughter, be of good comfort: thy faith hath made thee whole; go in peace.

chapters.zh: 还说话的时候，有人从管会堂的家里来，说：你的女儿死了，不要劳动夫子。
chapters.en: While he yet spake, there cometh one from the ruler of the synagogue's , saying to him, Thy daughter is dead; trouble not the Master.

chapters.zh: 耶稣听见就对他说：不要怕，只要信！你的女儿就必得救。
chapters.en: But when Jesus heard , he answered him, saying, Fear not: believe only, and she shall be made whole.

chapters.zh: 耶稣到了他的家，除了彼得、约翰、雅各，和女儿的父母，不许别人同他进去。
chapters.en: And when he came into the house, he suffered no man to go in, save Peter, and James, and John, and the father and the mother of the maiden.

chapters.zh: 众人都为这女儿哀哭捶胸。耶稣说：不要哭。他不是死了，是睡著了。
chapters.en: And all wept, and bewailed her: but he said, Weep not; she is not dead, but sleepeth.

chapters.zh: 他们晓得女儿已经死了，就嗤笑耶稣。
chapters.en: And they laughed him to scorn, knowing that she was dead.

chapters.zh: 耶稣拉著他的手，呼叫说：女儿，起来罢！
chapters.en: And he put them all out, and took her by the hand, and called, saying, Maid, arise.

chapters.zh: 他的灵魂便回来，他就立刻起来了。耶稣吩咐给他东西吃。
chapters.en: And her spirit came again, and she arose straightway: and he commanded to give her meat.

chapters.zh: 他的父母惊奇得很；耶稣嘱咐他们，不要把所作的事告诉人。
chapters.en: And her parents were astonished: but he charged them that they should tell no man what was done.

chapters.zh: 耶稣叫齐了十二个门徒，给他们能力、权柄，制伏一切的鬼，医治各样的病，
chapters.en: Then he called his twelve disciples together, and gave them power and authority over all devils, and to cure diseases.

chapters.zh: 又差遣他们去宣传神国的道，医治病人，
chapters.en: And he sent them to preach the kingdom of God, and to heal the sick.

chapters.zh: 对他们说：行路的时候，不要带拐杖和口袋，不要带食物和银子，也不要带两件褂子。
chapters.en: And he said unto them, Take nothing for journey, neither staves, nor scrip, neither bread, neither money; neither have two coats apiece.

chapters.zh: 无论进那一家，就住在那里，也从那里起行。
chapters.en: And whatsoever house ye enter into, there abide, and thence depart.

chapters.zh: 凡不接待你们的，你们离开那城的时候，要把脚上的尘土跺下去，见证他们的不是。
chapters.en: And whosoever will not receive you, when ye go out of that city, shake off the very dust from your feet for a testimony against them.

chapters.zh: 门徒就出去，走遍各乡宣传福音，到处治病。
chapters.en: And they departed, and went through the towns, preaching the gospel, and healing every where.

chapters.zh: 分封的王希律听见耶稣所作的一切事，就游移不定；因为有人说：是约翰从死里复活；
chapters.en: Now Herod the tetrarch heard of all that was done by him: and he was perplexed, because that it was said of some, that John was risen from the dead;

chapters.zh: 又有人说：是以利亚显现；还有人说：是古时的一个先知又活了。
chapters.en: And of some, that Elias had appeared; and of others, that one of the old prophets was risen again.

chapters.zh: 希律说：约翰我已经斩了，这却是甚么人？我竟听见他这样的事呢？就想要见他。
chapters.en: And Herod said, John have I beheaded: but who is this, of whom I hear such things? And he desired to see him.

chapters.zh: 使徒回来，将所作的事告诉耶稣，耶稣就带他们暗暗的离开那里，往一座城去；那城名叫伯赛大。
chapters.en: And the apostles, when they were returned, told him all that they had done. And he took them, and went aside privately into a desert place belonging to the city called Bethsaida.

chapters.zh: 但众人知道了，就跟著他去；耶稣便接待他们，对他们讲论神国的道，医治那些需医的人。
chapters.en: And the people, when they knew , followed him: and he received them, and spake unto them of the kingdom of God, and healed them that had need of healing.

chapters.zh: 日头快要平西，十二个门徒来对他说：请叫众人散开，他们好往四面乡村里去借宿找吃的，因为我们这里是野地。
chapters.en: And when the day began to wear away, then came the twelve, and said unto him, Send the multitude away, that they may go into the towns and country round about, and lodge, and get victuals: for we are here in a desert place.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：你们给他们吃罢！门徒说：我们不过有五个饼，两条鱼，若不去为这许多人买食物就不够。
chapters.en: But he said unto them, Give ye them to eat. And they said, We have no more but five loaves and two fishes; except we should go and buy meat for all this people.

chapters.zh: 那时，人数约有五千。耶稣对门徒说：叫他们一排一排的坐下，每排大约五十个人。
chapters.en: For they were about five thousand men. And he said to his disciples, Make them sit down by fifties in a company.

chapters.zh: 门徒就如此行，叫众人都坐下。
chapters.en: And they did so, and made them all sit down.

chapters.zh: 耶稣拿著这五个饼，两条鱼，望著天祝福，擘开，递给门徒，摆在众人面前。
chapters.en: Then he took the five loaves and the two fishes, and looking up to heaven, he blessed them, and brake, and gave to the disciples to set before the multitude.

chapters.zh: 他们就吃，并且都吃饱了；把剩下的零碎收拾起来，装满了十二篮子。
chapters.en: And they did eat, and were all filled: and there was taken up of fragments that remained to them twelve baskets.

chapters.zh: 耶稣自己祷告的时候，门徒也同他在那里。耶稣问他们说：众人说我是谁？
chapters.en: And it came to pass, as he was alone praying, his disciples were with him: and he asked them, saying, Whom say the people that I am?

chapters.zh: 他们说：有人说是施洗的约翰；有人说是以利亚；还有人说是古时的一个先知又活了。
chapters.en: They answering said, John the Baptist; but some , Elias; and others , that one of the old prophets is risen again.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：你们说我是谁？彼得回答说：是神所立的基督。
chapters.en: He said unto them, But whom say ye that I am? Peter answering said, The Christ of God.

chapters.zh: 耶稣切切的嘱咐他们，不可将这事告诉人，
chapters.en: And he straitly charged them, and commanded to tell no man that thing;

chapters.zh: 又说：人子必须受许多的苦，被长老、祭司长、和文士弃绝，并且被杀，第三日复活。
chapters.en: Saying, The Son of man must suffer many things, and be rejected of the elders and chief priests and scribes, and be slain, and be raised the third day.

chapters.zh: 耶稣又对众人说：若有人要跟从我，就当舍己，天天背起他的十字架来跟从我。
chapters.en: And he said to all, If any will come after me, let him deny himself, and take up his cross daily, and follow me.

chapters.zh: 因为，凡要救自己生命（生命：或作灵魂；下同）的，必丧掉生命；凡为我丧掉生命的，必救了生命。
chapters.en: For whosoever will save his life shall lose it: but whosoever will lose his life for my sake, the same shall save it.

chapters.zh: 人若赚得全世界，却丧了自己，赔上自己，有甚么益处呢？
chapters.en: For what is a man advantaged, if he gain the whole world, and lose himself, or be cast away?

chapters.zh: 凡把我和我的道当作可耻的，人子在自己的荣耀里，并天父与圣天使的荣耀里降临的时候，也要把那人当作可耻的。
chapters.en: For whosoever shall be ashamed of me and of my words, of him shall the Son of man be ashamed, when he shall come in his own glory, and Father's, and of the holy angels.

chapters.zh: 我实在告诉你们，站在这里的，有人在没尝死味以前，必看见神的国。
chapters.en: But I tell you of a truth, there be some standing here, which shall not taste of death, till they see the kingdom of God.

chapters.zh: 说了这话以后约有八天，耶稣带著彼得、约翰、雅各上山去祷告。
chapters.en: And it came to pass about an eight days after these sayings, he took Peter and John and James, and went up into a mountain to pray.

chapters.zh: 正祷告的时候，他的面貌就改变了，衣服洁白放光。
chapters.en: And as he prayed, the fashion of his countenance was altered, and his raiment white glistering.

chapters.zh: 忽然有摩西、以利亚两个人同耶稣说话；
chapters.en: And, behold, there talked with him two men, which were Moses and Elias:

chapters.zh: 他们在荣光里显现，谈论耶稣去世的事，就是他在耶路撒冷将要成的事。
chapters.en: Who appeared in glory, and spake of his decease which he should accomplish at Jerusalem.

chapters.zh: 彼得和他的同伴都打盹，既清醒了，就看见耶稣的荣光，并同他站著的那两个人。
chapters.en: But Peter and they that were with him were heavy with sleep: and when they were awake, they saw his glory, and the two men that stood with him.

chapters.zh: 二人正要和耶稣分离的时候，彼得对耶稣说：夫子，我们在这里真好！可以搭三座棚，一座为你，一座为摩西，一座为以利亚。他却不知道所说的是甚么。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, as they departed from him, Peter said unto Jesus, Master, it is good for us to be here: and let us make three tabernacles; one for thee, and one for Moses, and one for Elias: not knowing what he said.

chapters.zh: 说这话的时候，有一朵云彩来遮盖他们；他们进入云彩里就惧怕。
chapters.en: While he thus spake, there came a cloud, and overshadowed them: and they feared as they entered into the cloud.

chapters.zh: 有声音从云彩里出来，说：这是我的儿子，我所拣选的（有古卷：这是我的爱子），你们要听他。
chapters.en: And there came a voice out of the cloud, saying, This is my beloved Son: hear him.

chapters.zh: 声音住了，只见耶稣一人在那里。当那些日子，门徒不提所看见的事，一样也不告诉人。
chapters.en: And when the voice was past, Jesus was found alone. And they kept close, and told no man in those days any of those things which they had seen.

chapters.zh: 第二天，他们下了山，就有许多人迎见耶稣。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, that on the next day, when they were come down from the hill, much people met him.

chapters.zh: 其中有一人喊叫说：夫子！求你看顾我的儿子，因为他是我的独生子。
chapters.en: And, behold, a man of the company cried out, saying, Master, I beseech thee, look upon my son: for he is mine only child.

chapters.zh: 他被鬼抓住就忽然喊叫；鬼又叫他抽疯，口中流沫，并且重重的伤害他，难以离开他。
chapters.en: And, lo, a spirit taketh him, and he suddenly crieth out; and it teareth him that he foameth again, and bruising him hardly departeth from him.

chapters.zh: 我求过你的门徒，把鬼赶出去，他们却是不能。
chapters.en: And I besought thy disciples to cast him out; and they could not.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：嗳！这又不信又悖谬的世代阿，我在你们这里，忍耐你们要到几时呢？将你的儿子带到这里来罢！
